projects.title: EduTrack
projects.subtitle: Student Assignment & Learning Management Portal
projects.tagline: A production-ready role-based learning platform supporting seamless student-instructor workflows.
projects.description: EduTrack is a robust, full-lifecycle role-based Learning Management System designed to streamline assignment submission, module delivery, grading, and performance tracking. It utilizes a highly normalized database and modern JWT auth with distinct administrative dashboards.
features: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC): Separate, custom dashboard layouts and feature permissions for students and instructors.
RESTful API Architecture: Structured endpoints built with Django REST Framework for authentication, course administration, file upload/download, and feedback cycles.
Database Normalization: Optimized SQLite schema with foreign key constraints establishing sound relationships between courses, assignments, submissions, and grades.
Deadline & Tracker System: Automated calendar alerts, announcements, and grading statistics for instructors to monitor student progress.
projects.metrics: 100% Normalized DB, Secure Role-based JWT Auth

projects.title: Home Decor E-Commerce
projects.subtitle: Premium E-Commerce Platform & Video-Shop System
projects.tagline: A cloud-hosted interior design store with dynamic interactive elements and high-performance optimizations.
projects.description: A production-ready WordPress and WooCommerce powered home decor web store. Engineered with highly customized visual layout additions including dynamic responsive sliders, an immersive CSS-powered video shopping portal, and comprehensive uptime analysis.
features: Mobile-Optimized video reel ('Watch & Shop') enabling immersive, direct-checkout integrations using optimized flexbox layouts.
Uptime Monitoring & Cloud Architecture: Deployed and tested across server environments ensuring 99.9% availability and streamlined asset delivery.
Testimonial Gallery: Built an interactive customer testimonial layout with CSS scroll-snapping and visual transition curves.
projects.metrics: 99.9% Uptime, Responsive CSS Scroll-Snapping Video Reel

projects.title: Production Management System
projects.subtitle: Enterprise Metrics & Dynamic Dashboard Suite
projects.tagline: A secure PHP portal visualizing yearly, monthly, and weekly corporate manufacturing indicators.
projects.description: An elegant production monitoring system designed to query and process manufacturing telemetry. Features secure, sanitised CRUD operations for industrial logs and structures data outputs into rich, human-readable charts for deep business insights.
features: Dynamic Dashboard: Aggregates raw log entries into clean tables and trend grids tracking weekly, monthly, and yearly margins.
Validated CRUD Operations: Engineered with custom database triggers and sanitised queries to protect integrity and block injection vectors.
Structured SQL Logic: Fully custom database schemas utilizing MySQL subqueries and analytical indexing.

certifications.title: Django Application Development with SQL and Databases
Python Data Structures: Lists, Strings & Files

replies.message:
Hi Demo,

Thank you for reaching out! I am Raviraj’s AI Assistant, and I am thrilled to connect with you. 

Raviraj is a passionate Creative Full-Stack Developer currently pursuing his MCA at CHARUSAT, specializing in **Django, Angular, and SQL databases**. He has a proven track record of building robust, user-centric applications, such as **EduTrack**—a role-based learning management system featuring secure JWT authentication, REST APIs, and dynamic dashboards. With a strong academic foundation (9.68 CGPA in his BCA) and hands-on experience in full-stack development, he is eager to contribute to innovative projects.

He is currently open to internships, full-time developer roles, and project collaborations. Please let us know how we can assist you, or feel free to share any opportunities you would like to discuss!

Best regards,

**Raviraj Chauhan**  
Creative Full-Stack Developer  
Email: ravirajchauhan219@gmail.com
